description_long: This is an adult male figure with a full beard and short hair, standing upright with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. He is dressed in a loose, long-sleeved shirt with exaggeratedly wide sleeves and a visible seam pattern, paired with fitted pants and simple shoes. The shirt appears to be made of a textured fabric, while the pants are more form-fitting and the shoes are basic and flat. The figure's facial features are well-defined, with a prominent nose and brow, and the hair is styled close to the scalp with some volume at the top. The overall build is average, with natural body proportions and a neutral expression. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the clothing style suggests a casual or possibly historical/folk influence.
description: An adult male with a beard, short hair, and a loose, wide-sleeved shirt paired with fitted pants and simple shoes, standing in a T-pose. The figure has natural proportions and no visible accessories.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full face, beard, short hair, wide-sleeved shirt, fitted pants, and shoes with arms extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the volume of the shirt sleeves, and the side seam of the pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, the shirt's back, and the fit of the pants and shoes from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, shirt sleeve, and pant seam from the opposite side.
attribute_clothing_type: loose long-sleeved shirt with wide sleeves and fitted pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: short hair with some volume on top
